rationale: Falsifiability lens on the round-2 delta (21374bb8..389fcc41). The reroute is a pure 2-file seam swap: internal/approve/impl.go changes only the RHS of two package-var seams (implIsAncestorFn: gitutil.IsAncestor -> lifecycle.IsAncestor; implBranchExistsFn: gitutil.BranchExists -> lifecycle.BranchExists), drops the internal/gitutil import, and reworks three comments. The new internal/lifecycle/gitquery.go adds two thin wrappers with byte-identical signatures — IsAncestor(workdir,ancestor,descendant string)(bool,error) and BranchExists(name string)bool — delegating straight to gitutil. Seam names, types, and injection points are UNCHANGED, so no AC1-13 named test could observe a difference; the RED-on-revert falsifiability I confirmed in round 1 is untouched. Verified `git diff 21374bb8..389fcc41 -- '*_test.go'` is EMPTY (no test edited). Spot tests all green: internal/approve, internal/lifecycle, internal/complete, internal/executor, plus lint/TestEnforcementHasNoGitLeaks. `go list` confirms internal/approve no longer imports gitutil. git status clean (only untracked review dir). No AC proof disturbed. My round-1 APPROVE holds.
